title: justicia lilloana
intro: Justicia lilloana, also known as Lilloa, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family, commonly found in the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia lilloana include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
